title: Approval Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger approval design foundations judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Approval Design Foundations is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Approval Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good approval design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Approval Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
